data.title: Willy Woo Highlights Bitcoin's Double Counting Issue
data.description: According to Foresight News, analyst Willy Woo has pointed out a tendency for assets like Bitcoin to be double-counted. He explains that Bitcoin's market capitalization is often calculated by its holders and then again through the stocks of companies like MicroStrategy (MSTR), leading to this double-counting issue.

data.title: USDC Treasury Mints Over 50 Million USDC on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury recently minted 50,083,900 USDC on the Ethereum blockchain. This newly created digital currency is valued at approximately $50,064,116.

data.title: SEC Chair Asserts Authority to Act on Blockchain Regulations
data.description:
According to PANews, SEC Chair Atkins has stated that the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) possesses the authority to implement regulations concerning blockchain technology without waiting for legislative action from Congress. This announcement highlights the SEC's proactive stance on addressing the evolving landscape of blockchain and cryptocurrency regulations.
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/28351615248042?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Analysts see Bitcoin buyer exhaustion as retail shifts to altcoins
data.description:
Buyer exhaustion may set the stage for a correction in August before investor capital surges into altcoins, much like in previous market cycles.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-altcoin-interest-bitcoin-buyer-exhaustion?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Wall Street giants amplify Bitcoin investments through ETFs and equities
data.description:
Major Wall Street institutions, including Wells Fargo, Cantor Fitzgerald, and Jane Street, have sharply increased their Bitcoin-related holdings over the past months. These firms’ portfolio updates on the stock analytics platform Quiver Quantitative reveal they are investing billions in the top crypto via exchange-traded funds and crypto-focused equities like Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy).
source: https://cryptoslate.com/wall-street-giants-amplify-bitcoin-investments-through-etfs-and-equities/

data.title: U.S. 30-Year Treasury Yield Reaches Highest Level Since 2021
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the yield on the U.S. 30-year Treasury bond has surpassed the 5-year yield by 109 basis points. This marks the widest gap since 2021.

data.title: You’re wrong about the GENIUS Act
data.description:
Critics misunderstand the GENIUS Act’s actual influence. It doesn’t free Bitcoin from taxes but breaks Wall Street’s stranglehold on dollar clearing.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/wrong-genius-act?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BONK Holds Key Support After Heavy Selling Hits Solana Meme Token
data.description:
The cryptocurrency known as BONK has managed to maintain a critical support level even after experiencing significant selling pressure that affected the Solana-based meme token. This situation highlights the resilience of BONK in the face of market fluctuations and investor sentiment, as traders continue to monitor its performance closely. Despite the challenges posed by heavy selling activity, BONK's ability to hold key support indicates potential stability and offers insight into the overall dynamics of the meme token landscape within the Solana ecosystem.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/08/15/bonk-holds-key-support-after-heavy-selling-hits-solana-meme-token

data.title: Google Play Imposes Tougher Licensing Rules for Crypto Apps Worldwide
data.description:
Google Play has recently implemented more stringent licensing regulations for cryptocurrency applications across the globe, aiming to enhance security measures and ensure compliance with legal standards. This move reflects the growing concerns around the regulation of digital currencies and is intended to protect users from potential risks associated with crypto transactions and services offered through mobile applications. As a result, developers of crypto-related apps will need to navigate these new requirements to distribute their products on the Google Play platform, potentially leading to a significant shift in how cryptocurrency services are accessed by users worldwide.
source: https://voiceofcrypto.online/ampstories/web-stories/google-play-imposes-tougher-licensing-rules-for-crypto-apps-worldwide

data.title: Galaxy secures $1.4B loan to fast-track Texas Helios AI datacenter
data.description:
Galaxy Digital secures $1. 4 billion to expand its Texas Helios AI data center, expecting $1 billion annual revenue from a 15-year CoreWeave partnership.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/galaxy-digital-1-4b-coreweave-ai-datacenter?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: OpenAI's Ambitious Plans for Expansion in Consumer Hardware and Neural Interfaces
data.description:
According to Foresight News, OpenAI founder Sam Altman has revealed in an interview that ChatGPT has rapidly become one of the most widely used and influential products globally. Altman is now planning to make significant strides into consumer hardware, brain-computer interfaces, and social media sectors. He expressed interest in acquiring Chrome if the U.S. government forces Google to sell it.

Altman also discussed his ambition to raise trillions of dollars to build data centers, emphasizing the need for more GPUs to maintain scalability, which he considers a top priority. He stated, "You should expect OpenAI to spend trillions on data center construction in the near future. We must make difficult trade-offs now; we have better models, but we can't offer them due to insufficient computing power. We also want to provide other types of new products and services."

Furthermore, Altman confirmed recent reports that OpenAI plans to invest in a brain-computer interface startup to compete with Elon Musk's Neuralink. He remarked, "I think neural interfaces are a cool idea worth exploring. I hope that whatever I think, ChatGPT can respond."

data.title: BlackRock’s Crypto Holdings Balloon As Bitcoin, Ethereum Reach For New ATHs — Here Are The Numbers
data.description:
BlackRock’s cryptocurrency portfolio has surpassed the $100 billion mark, as Bitcoin and Ethereum push to new all-time highs. The world’s largest asset manager now holds nearly $104 billion in digital assets, and this achievement came as Bitcoin briefly broke above $124,000 on August 14, 2025, to set a new price record before consolidating between $118,000 and $121,000. Ethereum also surged to nearly $4,790, just shy of its 2021 peak of $4,878. BlackRock’s Expanding Digital Asset Portfolio Bitcoin and Ethereum have been on a price roll in recent weeks, and a large part of this momentum can be attributed to steady institutional inflows into Spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs based in the US
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/blackrocks-bitcoin-ethereum/
